title: Bare Bones x Cinderscapes
description: Pack which changes Cinderscapes art to reflect the barebones style (USES MODIFIED CINDERSCAPES TEXTURES)
body:
This texture pack integrates Cinderscapes into the Bare Bones style, by redoing all the textures. 

This pack will cause visual inconsistency when used with newer versions of Bare Bones, which change the color of netherrack

Information about the relicense: The reason I relicensed this project to the AGPL is because people were stealing my code from another project (which was done from scratch by the way), and using it for their own projects. I would love to keep it under the MIT license, but if this continues, I will have to put this mod under a Polyform or ARR License, which I do not want to do.
